behaviors.normalMode: required products configure before add; products without required add directly
behaviors.quickMode: all products add directly; missing required enters pending area
behaviors.editSingleQuantity: simple option applies directly; drink with modifiers opens compact option modal
behaviors.editMultipleQuantity: always opens quantity selector first; selected quantity is split into a separate cart line when needed
behaviors.cartOrdering: sorted by product/menu order rather than click order; each row has a light-coffee sequence badge
behaviors.legacyCartMigration: normalizes missing options, required groups, drink slots and assignments before any edit
behaviors.productCard: image area plus always-visible name, code/subtitle and price; missing image uses readable fallback
behaviors.quickDrinkLimit: equals current unfilled combo drink slots
behaviors.quickDrinkPopover: anchored immediately above selected drink; width equals two thirds of current product card
behaviors.pendingOrders: MoreFun App and phone/WhatsApp groups expand and scroll independently
behaviors.runtimeErrors: action handlers are contained; data is preserved and error is reported to root without automatic reload
